title: 唔見左部iphone12...連尋找都搵唔到

replies.msg: 明明有登記尋找 依家用返舊手機開「尋找」都搵唔到 係咪要佢開機先搵到？ 但我見apple官網又話關左機都尋找到...仲有冇方法搵得返 部新機買左唔夠兩個月 屌
尋找到你都唔會拎得返
你以為find my iphone真係find到？
有冇計lock 柒佢搵唔返都唔撚俾佢賣

quote.msg: 有冇計lock 柒佢搵唔返都唔撚俾佢賣

replies.msg: 佢一樣賣到D零件都有人要

replies.msg:
開activation lock 就用唔到

iPhone 12 有零件鎖, 就算黑市都賣唔到太多錢

賊人9成9拎走咗你張SIM -- 通知咗電訊商咗未？唔好奢求SIM card data plan 會幫你, 你擔心俾人用黎打收費電話好過

賊人好可能唔係用緊iPhone 因為如果係apple device 會pick up 你部電話既bluetooth signal send 返地點俾你

可能成部機賣幾百或者一千蚊咁

你好快會收到SMS話有人搵到你部iPhone
唔好信就得

Thx bro 但我用尋找都搵唔到部機 想問點樣開個activation lock 同埋點解用尋找會搵唔到部機 我好肯定買返黎既時候有開到尋找呢項野 有冇可能係佢開到我部機再關左個尋找功能 電訊商果邊搞掂喇

replies.msg:
其實你冇咩可以做，要做既衹係三步
1. 上icloud.com/find 揀返device, mark as lost (相信你已經做咗)
2. 準備好device serial number (icloud.com 可能有). 報狗同電訊商
3. 等到find my 既email (深圳華強北咁多人用iPhone, 到時你部iPhone 衹要唔係冇電就會用bluetooth send signal 透過其他iPhone send 俾你知佢到咗自己生命終點)

關於Activation Lock 你可能要刨下文
https://support.apple.com/en-us/HT201365

同埋有啲銀行有數碼產品保險. 會包埋盜竊, 2年保費衹係貴過AppleCare+ 少少或者你下次可以諗諗
另外Activation Lock 佢地解唔到，除非知你Apple ID 密碼

quote.msg:
開activation lock 就用唔到

iPhone 12 有零件鎖, 就算黑市都賣唔到太多錢

replies.msg: 如果係我用尋找前已經俾佢地洗左機又再關埋尋找 會唔會因為咁所以我連icloud都搵唔返自己部機？

quote.msg: 另外Activation Lock 佢地解唔到，除非知你Apple ID 密碼
如果係我用尋找前已經俾佢地洗左機又再關埋尋找 會唔會因為咁所以我連icloud都搵唔返自己部機？

replies.msg:
要disable activation lock 先比erase (洗機)

When you Mark As Lost, this locks your screen with a passcode and lets you display a custom message with your phone number to help you get it back. You can also remotely erase your device if needed, and your custom message continues to display even after the device is erased.

While Activation Lock works in the background to make it more difficult for someone to use or sell your missing device, Lost Mode clearly indicates to anyone who finds your device that it still belongs to you and can’t be reactivated without your password.

quote.msg: 另外Activation Lock 佢地解唔到，除非知你Apple ID 密碼
如果係我用尋找前已經俾佢地洗左機又再關埋尋找 會唔會因為咁所以我連icloud都搵唔返自己部機？

要disable activation lock 先比erase (洗機)

When you Mark As Lost, this locks your screen with a passcode and lets you display a custom message with your phone number to help you get it back. You can also remotely erase your device if needed, and your custom message continues to display even after the device is erased.

While Activation Lock works in the background to make it more difficult for someone to use or sell your missing device, Lost Mode clearly indicates to anyone who finds your device that it still belongs to you and can’t be reactivated without your password.

replies.msg: 但我用icloud 連尋找我部機去開個lost mode/開activation lock都唔得 會唔會有可能係佢地喺我用icloud 去尋找我部機前已經有方法可以洗到我機黎reboot 再關左個尋找function

quote.msg: 如果係我用尋找前已經俾佢地洗左機又再關埋尋找 會唔會因為咁所以我連icloud都搵唔返自己部機？

要disable activation lock 先比erase (洗機)

When you Mark As Lost, this locks your screen with a passcode and lets you display a custom message with your phone number to help you get it back. You can also remotely erase your device if needed, and your custom message continues to display even after the device is erased.

While Activation Lock works in the background to make it more difficult for someone to use or sell your missing device, Lost Mode clearly indicates to anyone who finds your device that it still belongs to you and can’t be reactivated without your password.
但我用icloud 連尋找我部機去開個lost mode/開activation lock都唔得 會唔會有可能係佢地喺我用icloud 去尋找我部機前已經有方法可以洗到我機黎reboot 再關左個尋找function

replies.msg:
唔得既意思係指定唔到位？

如果Find My 入面仲有你個device 即係部機係你既， 佢地做唔到嘢
放心喇，佢地除咗劏機 (12 開始遦零件都有鎖) 同呃你Apple ID 密碼冇嘢可以做到
仲你唔放心就開埋2-factor authentication 進一步保證自己Apple ID

Remove “Find My” device 會有email 通知架
除非你話佢地hack 埋Apple activation server 或者你個email account 幫你del 咗封email

巴打都係去轉genius bar 睇睇點喇
我都想知佢地幫唔幫你lock 機
